text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I happen to bump into Gold Ship while walking
around the academy.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Grr! Man, I'm sooo mad!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
"What's wrong," you ask? What isn't?! It all
started with Jordan...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Dating Hot Spots for You and Your Boo ☆? Why would you of all people need to read something like that?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Um, excuse you. You are the last person I wanna hear that from.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Nuh-uh, excuse you! I can totally get a date!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: No chance. Like, I'd even bet my new polish on it.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Them's fightin' words, sister! I could go on the
perfect date if I put my mind to it!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You've got nothing better to do, right, Trainer?
Come on, we're going out, right now!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yes! And I'm gonna rub how easy going on a date
is right in Jordan's stupid face!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I manage to get another word in, she
drags me out by the collar...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
First, set the mood by shopping in a fancy part of
town! ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: ...is what the magazine says. So, here we are.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the fancy part of town, this place looks a
bit... dilapidated.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Well, there's gotta be something fun around
here... Oh!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Look over there, Trainer! Isn't that awesome?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
At that super energetic shrimp at the fishmonger's
over there! It looks like it's about to leap out of
the tank any second!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Well, that's one way to set a mood, all right. Just what in the world will be in store for me next?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Take it easy at a nice cafe once you're all
shopped out. ♪ Now that's advice I like!
choice_data_list: You realize this is a ramen shop, right?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Yep! What's the problem? Ramen is pretty much a drink, anyway. Ipso facto, a ramen shop is a cafe!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
One order of pork ramen with firm noodles,
barista man!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My rather unique "date" with the peppy Gold
Ship continues full steam ahead.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
"Go on a moonlit walk in the park to end the
night on the perfect note. ♪"

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Forget the walk! Let's up the ante with some
moonlit soccer! Let's gooo!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Transcendent Pandemonium Kick! Followed by a
Mental Break Shot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Awww yeah!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
See how the ball went down the slide perfectly?!
This match is mine!
choice_data_list: (No way a rule like that exists...)
(No way a rule like that exists...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been several hours since we started our
"date," but I'm still not sure that's the right label
for whatever is going on...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Whew... I'm spent. So, what now?
choice_data_list: I'll go buy us some drinks.
Overtime! I won't quit until I win!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You read my mind! Get me a cola, hold the
carbonation.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Aaah... Today was fun, not gonna lie.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Setting the "date" part aside, I really did enjoy
our time together.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Full disclosure, I've been taking pics all day as
mementos. See? Here's the shrimp... and our
ramen... and our soccer match.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I wonder what Jordan'll say tomorrow when
I show her these beauties?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have a feeling she won't consider our day an
actual date.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Put another way, Gold Ship and I might be the
only ones who can understand how much fun we
had today.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh, by the way, I'll be sure to send you the 120
continuous burst shots I took of the shrimp later.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
They're preeetty awesome shots, if I say so
myself. I can't hog 'em all to myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sure enough, my phone buzzes well into the night
as the 120 "awesome" shots of the shrimp flood
my phone.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh, now you're talking! All right, I'm game! You
kick off this time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I zero in on the ball. Then, I focus all my energy
into my leg and... kick!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Whoooa!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The ball's stuck in the slide like a glove! I don't
think it'll ever come unstuck now!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That was awesome! No way I can beat that! I hate
to admit it, but you take home the win today,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't have a clue what rules Gold Ship's game
runs on, but I still feel quite pleased to be the
winner.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Phew! I had a real blast today. That soccer match
of ours was the funnest thing of all, though.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think back on the shrimp at the fishmonger's and
how we ended up having a soccer match at a
playground, despite being decidedly outside the
intended age range.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Anyone else would surely call us weird, but letting
loose and just enjoying ourselves is the definition
of my relationship with Gold Ship.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Dates sure are fun. We should do this again. Next
time, we can play crimson hellflame soccer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I nod at Gold Ship, and the two of us gaze up at
the stars.
